mapper.select: select su.sys_id, su.user_id, su.user_name, su.dept_cd, sd.dept_nm, su.user_password, su.password_fail_cnt, su.init_yn, su.use_yn, su.sys_plant_cd from sys_user su left join mas_dept sd on sd.dept_cd = su.dept_cd and sd.sys_plant_cd = su.sys_plant_cd where 1=1 and su.user_id = #{userId} and su.delete_yn = 'N'
